one_liner: Meta Ads (Marketing API) lets developers programmatically manage Facebook/Instagram advertising campaigns via a broad REST API secured by OAuth2, free to use but gated by tiered rate limits requiring Meta App Review for production-scale access.

auth_methods.notes: User, System User, or Page access tokens with ads_management/ads_read scopes; passed as access_token query param or Authorization: Bearer header.

self_serve_notes: Development Access tier is self-serve with a Facebook developer app (limited quota, 60 points/300s), but production-grade Standard/Advanced Access requires Meta App Review, business verification, and use-case approval.

api_surface.notes: Graph API-based Marketing API covering campaigns, ad sets, ads, creatives, insights, audiences, etc. Also has an official PHP Business SDK and other language SDKs.

main_blocker: Full production access requires Meta App Review and business verification; default dev access is heavily rate-limited (60 points/300s) and only usable for testing on owned accounts.

evidence.supports: OAuth2 auth details, scopes, rate limits, REST API surface
Official SDK usage with app ID/secret/access token
App Review process required for Advanced Access
Tiered access model: Development, Standard, Advanced
Existence of open-source Meta Ads MCP servers
